_note_plan: Capacity-matched HONF comparison for D,c -> H -> U versus no-H shortcut behavior.
_note_notation: D = layout/module structure, c = operating context, H = learned hypergraph organization, U = predicted physical field, q = query point.

ablations.name: H_enhanced_pairwise
ablations.notes: Enhanced HONF: query-module pairwise geometry is routed through A_mh and query-to-hyperedge attention, preserving H as the organizing bottleneck.

ablations.name: NH2_no_hyper_current_like_direct005_capacity
ablations.notes: No-H current-like direct shortcut capacity control with global, near-module, and gated direct module/env residual context.
